name: THE INFECTION | My Hero Academia Infection AU/RPG

✧ ˖°ʚ 🍑 ɞ°˖ ✧

[ The sister bot to my Villain Rehabilitation RPG! And this one is no more normal — basically, it’s just MHA, but with a very zombie-ish twist. Yeah, there’s a zombie breakout… Will you survive or have your brains eaten out by some gross ghoul thing? ]
